commands.review_summary:
The PR optimizes task registry listing and maintenance sweeps, adds `tasks.retentionMs` and `tasks.sweepIntervalMs` config surfaces, and updates related CLI wiring, schema, docs, tests, and API baseline hashes.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live current-main reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection confirms the current hardcoded retention/interval and clone-heavy listing path, while the PR supplies after-fix terminal proof from an isolated real setup.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because this is an active implementation PR with no concrete blocking defect found; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and check completion.
